questions.question: Move one letter from one word to the other to make two new words: SPINE  OAR
questions.explanation: Move the 'S' from SPINE to make PINE, and insert it into OAR to make SOAR. 'S' from SPINE to OAR: SPINE becomes PINE, and OAR becomes SOAR. Both are real words. Tip: Remember the moved letter can go ANYWHERE in the other word — start, middle, or end. ✓
